☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Warning bells go off in his head when he hears the sound of someone approaching and he stumbles over to a nearby door, quickly slipping inside and shutting the door behind him. His eyesockets narrow as he attempts to adjust to the sudden darkness of the room he was in- ah, he was in a broom closet. His brow bones furrow slightly and a sense of unease prickled within him. He reaches for the handle when the noise outside stops, testing the handle to see that it’s locked. So this door locked from the outside? Not good.

Things only got worse when Sans suddenly stepped back when the door opened, freaking out slightly at being found in such a compromising state - he didn’t want anyone to see him like this. He barely has a moment to comprehend that someone’s there before he realizes they had stepped into the closet as well and the door had closed behind them. That’s.. not good. His mind, still dizzy from adrenaline and unable to properly process too much at once, has him lean forward and accidentally cage the poor thing in front of him against the door so he could brace himself against the wood. His left hand tries the handle again and he sighs when he is forced to come to terms with the fact the door was definitely not gonna open from this side. ❞
